properties.description: File upload to object storage is in progress.
properties.label: Uploading

properties.description: Transcription job is queued or running (ASR + diarization).
properties.label: Transcribing

properties.description: Transcript persisted; protocol generation has not started yet (or is in progress).
properties.label: Transcript ready

properties.description: LLM-based protocol generation job is queued or running.
properties.label: Generating protocol

properties.description: Protocol has been generated and persisted; no manual edits yet.
properties.label: Protocol ready

properties.description: Protocol has been manually edited at least once. Repeats on every save (version increments).
properties.label: Edited

properties.description: Non-recoverable error in the transcription or protocol-generation pipeline. Terminal state per BRQ-009.
properties.label: Failed

properties.description: Russian language. Used for ASR language hint and LLM prompt selection.
properties.label: Russian

properties.description: English language. Used for ASR language hint and LLM prompt selection.
properties.label: English
